title: One Month of Dance Classes for One Person at Latin Rhythms Dance (58% Off)

pricing_options.label: Four Dance Classes During One Month for One Person (Ages 18 and Up)

structured_fields.label: WHAT'S INCLUDED
value: Dance classes in Salsa, Bachata, and Mambo
Classes available at all fitness levels

highlights_html: Professional instructors lead students in lessons of Salsa, Bachata, and Mambo across all fitness levels
highlights_text: Professional instructors lead students in lessons of Salsa, Bachata, and Mambo across all fitness levels
about_deal_html:
After Your Purchase
After purchasing this deal, you'll need to visit the merchant's website to complete redemption. Learn more here.

  • Since August 2000, Latin Rhythms Dance has helped thousands of all skill levels, and cultural backgrounds, learn and improve their Latin dancing. Their proven programs, from beginner to professional, allow students to jump in at their comfort level and advance as far as their heart desires.

  • Click here to view the class schedule

  • No dance partner required. Click here to see what it's like to take a dance class by yourself.

  • New customers only

  • Must be 18 or older

WHAT TO EXPECT FROM CLASSES...

·       Certified Curriculum! All instructors follow a certified curriculum which is developed by the Artistic Director, Maricza Valentin. Maricza has been teaching since 1988 and is a graduate of Columbia College-Chicago with a degree in dance performance, teaching, and choreography.

·       Enter at ANY Skill Level! Courses are structured to meet the needs of our students and their diverse skill levels, from complete beginner to seasoned pro. Not sure where to start? Let us evaluate you for FREE. Drop by our studio anytime during business hours and we will assess your skill level honestly and objectively and place you in a class best suited for you. With this Groupon, you can register for any style, at any level, as long as you are a first-time student. Offer not valid for private lessons. 

·       Flexible Schedule! Classes are designed to work with your current schedule — Monday-Thursday evenings and Saturday mornings. One class = 4 sessions which meet 1 hour per week for 4 weeks.

·       Great Workout! Be sure to wear shoes and clothing you will be comfortable dancing in.. please keep in mind, LRDS is a family setting.

Latin Rhythms Dance's COVID-19 Precautions

  • Most classes happen online on Zoom now
  • Note that state and local guidelines are changing regularly. Please check Latin Rhythms Dance’s website or contact them for their latest guidelines.

review_quotes.text: There's a bit of a complicated starting process and classes for beginners classes full up fast. Recommend it though
review_quotes.author: Seccoyah

review_quotes.text: Víctor is a great teacher ! Love the socials
review_quotes.author: Marianne

review_quotes.text: I enjoy the class, and I will recommend it to other friends .They make you feel very welcome, and they teach you very well, The right way, had to Dance salsa and I love that.
review_quotes.author: Laura

review_quotes.text: If you're trying to learn how to dance, this is the place to go great intructors/teachers great experience started with bachata basic one and just sign up for bachata 3 next week 👍🏽👍🏽👍🏽
review_quotes.author: Manuel
